lastReleaseMessage: library grid: drop minmax floor from 78px to 64px so it doesn't collapse to one column in narrow editor panels; add min-width:0 safeguard

barRaise.topFinding: Sixth consecutive daily bar-raise and the repo still has not moved. Process-stalled, not product-dead: no HIGH or MEDIUM touches the running label engine, which is in good shape. Latest commit is still 28fe3cd (2026-05-29), now three days cold and predating three reports; last release is v0.15.8 (2026-05-26), six days back. Six review reports sit untracked in git; this makes seven. Every carryover re-verified live and unchanged: em-dashes across all six public files, html2canvas 1.4.1 still CDN-loaded in index.html:15, PROJECT_SPEC 4.4/4.5/11 still pre-v0.15, README still pitches 20 herbs against a live 199, and write-dashboard-status.ps1 still clobbers barRaise and pins audit findings to 0/0/0 on every release. Verdict holds at stalled under the picker rule. The loop cannot self-correct; a human must drain it once and fix the handoff.
